tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Play with Electric Guitar Barre Chords using Fuzz/Overdrive/Low Flanger Effects,very easy song to play.

recommended.song_name: I Only Wanna Be With You

content:
THIS MY RENDITION OF 
BLACK EYED PEAS "I GOTTA FEELING"

[tab]CHORDS USED :  ( [ch]G5[/ch], [ch]C5[/ch], [ch]E5[/ch], [ch]Em[/ch], [ch]G/B[/ch],  [ch]C[/ch] )
             e = 0   0   0    0    3   0[/tab]
             B = 0   0   0    0    3   1
             G = 0   5   9    0    0   0
             D = 5   5   9    2    0   2
             A = 5   3   7    2    2   3
             E = 3   0   0    0    0   0

[tab]FOR THESE CHORDS PROGRESSION ([ch]G5[/ch], [ch]C5[/ch], [ch]E5[/ch], [ch]C5[/ch]) POUND 
THE STRUMMING,[/tab]

BUT FOR THESE CHORDS PROGRESSION (G/[ch]B[/ch], [ch]C[/ch], [ch]Em[/ch], [ch]C[/ch]) STRUM NORMALLY


COMMENTS & ADDITIONS TO sanviduca@yahoo.com
or sanviduca@gmail.com
